title: New job pay
h1: What does the new job pay? (optional)
p1: This page is optional but if you choose to tell us the pay then you will have to tell us if the claimant is paid weekly, monthly or annually.
p2: Tell us the gross pay - before tax and other deductions. You'll find this on the claimant's new payslips or ask their employer for details.
payBeforeTax: Enter the pay BEFORE tax and National Insurance amount in pounds
weeklyMonthlyAnnual: Is this the weekly, monthly or annual pay?

newJobPay.required: Tell us the pay before tax and NI
newJobPay.invalidCurrency: Enter pay before tax and NI in the correct format, for example £600 or £193.54
newJobPay.tooHighCurrency: Pay before tax and NI must be £9,999,999.99 or less
